creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 195659
Error during build net/belle-sip without MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes

Build log in attach.
100% reproducible on baremetal 11.2 amd64 Core 2 Duo E7200.
With MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes build without any errors.

But it build without errors on VM: 4 cores, 11.2 i386; host is 11.2 amd64, Core i7 920.
